name: CIDB Contractor Grading
description: Contractor grading designation (1 to 9) by class of work, used to confirm a contractor may tender for a contract of a given value. Switches on the universal BOQ quality rules today. CIDB-specific eligibility checks are on the roadmap and reported as unsupported until implemented in core.

classes_of_work.name: Specialist works (asphalt, demolition, glazing, landscaping, piling and others)

note: Tender value ceilings are indicative (ZAR) and reflect the schedule revised by the CIDB on 7 October 2019. They are periodically updated; confirm a contractor's current standing against the CIDB Register of Contractors before relying on these figures.
